templates.subject: You left something behind
templates.body: Your selected items are still waiting for you. Complete your order before they are gone.

templates.subject: Your order has been received
templates.body: Thank you for your order. We are preparing it and will update you soon.

templates.subject: How was your order?
templates.body: We hope you love your product. Please leave a quick review and help other customers.

templates.subject: We saved something special for you
templates.body: Come back and discover new products selected for you.
